title: Rocks Comes to Elbaf
description: On pages 4–6, this part follows Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, King Harald, Unknown person #6, Usopp, World Government as The story turns toward Elbaf’s past, Loki, Rocks, Harald, and the ancient grudges shaping the island’s present conflict.
scene: The story turns toward Elbaf’s past, Loki, Rocks, Harald, and the ancient grudges shaping the island’s present conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In a mere two years since their formation, the record of the rocks crew spoke for itself.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: 16 Documented raids... 76 sunken ships...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 14 ports reduced to Ash... Five towns wiped off the map...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: One nation brought to ruin...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Three unprecedented violations of Article 18 of International Law...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: and 25 criminal records... quietly erased.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even with the future pirate King, Gold D. Roger, sailing the seas,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It would not be an over- statement...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...to refer to this period as the era of rocks.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Enishi, New World

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What are you doing?! Leave this place at once, Harald!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All non- affiliated nations are considered lawless territories.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't concern yourselves with the humans living here; they have no rights.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's messed up! The world government can't just decree everything like that!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let them go! This country gave aid to Elbaf during our famine, out of the kindness of their hearts!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: They're our friends! Our Saviors!

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: King Harald! Help us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We're not leaving without repaying our debt!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Harald, you understand that Elbaf is under consideration for becoming a member nation, correct?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: intervening to help us would be one thing...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But you'll only hurt your membership bid if you intervene on behalf of a non-affilated country!!

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: So stay out of the way, Harald!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: KyAah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You scum...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You aren't human!!

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: King Harald!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "King Harald Exposed: Elbaf monarch sinks Innocent Battleship!"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Alliance with government revealed as a ploy!" (World economic journal headlines)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Voha ha ha ha ha ha ha! ya see?! that's the government for ya!!

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: Let's drink at the castle, Harald!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: IDA'S TAVERN, ELBAF

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't be dumb. I'm not letting a man with a reputation as bad as yours come into the mainland.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your whole nation should be joining up with me!

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: Come on, Harald! Give it up!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't stand seem' ya grovel to the government anymore!

summary: This part advances the Elbaf’s Buried History through 35 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
